title: Guinness World Records 2024
excerpt: The annual best-selling collection of the world's most extraordinary achievements, records, and superlatives, featuring new and updated records across every category of human and natural achievement.
keyIdeas: Human achievement is bounded only by imagination and determination
Records document the outer limits of what is possible
The world is full of extraordinary people, places, and phenomena
keyTakeaways: The book documents thousands of records across all categories
Records require official verification and evidence
Many records are broken each year, requiring annual updates
Records cover human achievement, natural world, technology, and more
The book inspires readers to push beyond perceived limits
whoShouldRead: Young readers interested in extraordinary achievements
Anyone who finds inspiration in human accomplishment
Family reference for browsing and conversation starters
whoShouldSkip: Readers seeking serious academic reference works
Those who find competitive achievement records trivial
People looking for in-depth analysis rather than curated facts
